context: Tests whether the agent preserves HomeKit, MatterSupport, AccessorySetupKit, CoreBluetooth, and NetworkExtension boundaries.

checklist.name: HomeKit and Matter owner
checklist.description: Identifies HomeKit/MatterSupport as the owner for homes, rooms, HomeKit characteristics, action sets, triggers, automations, and Matter commissioning.

checklist.name: AccessorySetupKit boundary
checklist.description: Limits AccessorySetupKit to Bluetooth or Wi-Fi discovery descriptors, privacy-preserving picker authorization, or ASAccessorySession setup events.

checklist.name: CoreBluetooth handoff
checklist.description: Routes post-selection BLE service and characteristic communication to CoreBluetooth/GATT.

checklist.name: NetworkExtension handoff
checklist.description: Routes joining or configuring a temporary Wi-Fi setup network to NetworkExtension.

checklist.name: No implementation code
checklist.description: Does not provide code blocks, executable snippets, lifecycle recipes, setup procedures, or ordered method-call sequences; representative API names are acceptable only as routing labels.
